title: On Holding AG: Company Events Publications and Financial Calendar
text: On Holding AG maintains a comprehensive financial calendar with scheduled quarterly earnings releases and annual shareholder meetings. The company follows a regular earnings release schedule with results typically announced in May (Q1), August (Q2), November (Q3), and February/March (Q4 and full-year). Earnings releases are followed by earnings calls with management and analyst questions. The company provides quarterly guidance and updates to full-year outlook as warranted by business performance. Investors can track key financial events and earnings dates through the company's investor relations calendar to stay informed on operational updates and financial performance.
